data.title: MediaTek Vice Chairman and CEO Dr. Rick Tsai to Headline COMPUTEX 2026 with a Keynote on the Future of AI
data.description: On March 30, 2026, in Taipei, the Taiwan External Trade Development Council (TAITRA) revealed that Dr. Rick Tsai, the Vice Chairman and CEO of MediaTek, is set to give a keynote speech at COMPUTEX 2026. This significant session is slated to take place in the morning of June.

data.title: Share repurchase programme: Transactions of week 13 2026Transaction in Own Shares
data.description: The share repurchase program will be active from February 5, 2026, to January 29, 2027, with Jyske Bank looking to acquire shares worth up to DKK 3 billion during this period. This initiative aligns with Corporate Announcement No. 11/2026 dated February 5, 2026. The program follows the guidelines of the Market Abuse Regulation (EU) No 596/2014 and the Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052 of March 8, 2016, collectively known as the "Safe Harbour Rules."

data.title: IQM Secures €50M Financing to Accelerate Global Growth
data.description: A company based in ESPOO, Finland, known as IQM Finland Oy, a prominent player in full-stack superconducting quantum computers, has disclosed a financial development. The company, also referred to as IQM Quantum Computers, has successfully obtained a substantial €50 million financing package from funds and accounts overseen by BlackRock. This financial support is intended to facilitate the advancement of IQM's technology roadmap, bolster research and development initiatives, aid in penetrating new markets, and solidify IQM's position as a leader in the field of quantum computing. The funding arrangement was finalized before the recent announcement made by IQM.
China Accepts GSK PLC’s Bepirovirsen for Evaluation

data.title: Revised start time for the 2026 Annual General Meeting of HMS Networks AB (publ)
data.description: HMS Networks AB (publ) has updated the starting time of the Annual General Meeting for 2026.

data.title: NBPE Announces Transaction in Own Shares
data.description: The details provided in this document are not intended for release, publication, or distribution in Australia, Canada, Italy, Denmark, Japan, the United States, or to any citizen of these locations.

data.title: Kalmar donates 100 000 euros to Tampere University to accelerate the development of strategic technology areas
data.description: Tampere University has received a substantial donation of 100,000 euros from Kalmar. The contribution is intended to speed up progress in crucial technology sectors that play a significant role in fostering sustainable innovations.
Sanoma has finished buying back its own shares.

data.title: GSR signs Memorandum of Understanding with Japan’s DORD to conduct joint demonstration test in the Clarion-Clipperton Zone
data.description: GSR, a subsidiary of DEME specializing in deep-sea exploration, has partnered with DORD from Japan to conduct a joint test in the Clarion-Clipperton Zone (CCZ). The Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) outlines their collaboration in exploring polymetallic nodule resources within DORD's licensed area. GSR will contribute its technical and operational capabilities to DORD's initiative.

data.title: JLT Mobile Computers Strengthens Defense Focus with SOFF Membership
data.description: JLT, a well-established company with over 30 years of experience in the industrial sector, is at the forefront of providing rugged computing solutions. They cater to the defense industry's increasing demand for durable computer systems in vehicles and field operations.

data.title: Virtune Expands with BitGo as an Additional Custodian
data.description: On March 30, 2026, Virtune revealed the inclusion of a new custodian, BitGo Europe GmbH, for certain Virtune ETPs. BitGo will work in conjunction with current custodians to enhance security measures for these selected ETPs.
Huhtamäki Oyj announces AGM notice for shareholders, detailing agenda with key decisions for the year ahead.
Korean companies have reportedly started importing Russian crude oil and naphtha because of the war-driven oil shock.

data.title: AltynGold Plc ("AltynGold" or the "Company") Participation in MINEX Kazakhstan 2026
data.description: AltynGold (LSE:ALTN), a Kazakh conglomerate in metals, mining, and energy sectors, will be participating as an exhibitor at the MINEX Kazakhstan Mining & Exploration Forum 2026 to be held from April 14-16, 2026, in Astana, Kazakhstan. This forum is a key event in the region for mining and exploration, attracting government officials, mining firms, investors, and industry players to discuss trends in Central Asia's mining industry.

data.title: accesso® Acquires Dexibit®, Establishing the First Cross Platform AI and Analytics Platform for Visitor Attractions
data.description: The recent acquisition has introduced accesso IntelligenceSM, a platform designed to integrate guest and operator data, providing comprehensive insights and facilitating actions throughout the entire operation. This technology launch took place in Orlando, Florida on March 30, 2026. accesso Technology Group, known for its expertise in providing technology solutions to leisure, entertainment, and cultural sectors, is listed on the AIM market with the symbol ACSO.

data.title: Canada suggests banning political donations via cryptocurrency due to interference concerns. A previous bill failed in 2024.
data.description: In 2024, a comparable bill was introduced, but it did not progress beyond the second reading in the House of Commons.

Japan Seen Capable of Handling Supply Disruptions with ~8 Months of Oil Reserves, Says S&P

data.title: Mikko Soirola joins Elisa Industriq as CEO to lead its next international growth phase
data.description: In Helsinki on March 30, 2026, Elisa Industriq officially announced the appointment of Mikko Soirola as its new CEO. This move is significant for the rapidly expanding international software company under the Elisa Group umbrella. Soirola's new role signifies a pivotal moment as Elisa Industriq progresses into its next stage of global development.

data.title: Bureau Veritas and Trade Technologies Join Forces to Streamline Global Trade Operations
data.description: Bureau Veritas, an industry leader in Testing, Inspection, and Certification services based in Courbevoie, France, has partnered with Trade Technologies, a renowned provider in trade finance automation. This collaboration, facilitated by Bureau Veritas' Swiss branch Government Services Division, marks a pivotal move in simplifying global trade processes. The agreement aims to streamline international trade activities, especially in areas with stringent regulations. Bureau Veritas' commitment to enhancing trade efficiency, combined with Trade Technologies' expertise, signifies a promising step towards facilitating smoother trade operations worldwide.
